scripts.build: esbuild js/htmx.js js/player.js js/editor.js css/player.css css/editor.css --bundle --platform=browser --format=iife --minify --outbase=. --outdir=static
scripts.watch: esbuild js/htmx.js js/player.js js/editor.js css/player.css css/editor.css --bundle --platform=browser --format=iife --outbase=. --outdir=static --watch
